headline: Wabtec Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
summary: PITTSBURGH, June 24, 2026--Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) announced it will report 2026 second quarter results before the U.S. financial markets open on July 22, 2026. The company will conduct a conference call to discuss those results with analysts and investors at 8:30 a.m. ET the same day. To listen to the call via webcast, visit Wabtec’s website at www.WabtecCorp.com and click on "Events & Presentations" in the "Investor Relations" section. An audio replay of the call will be available by ca
